scripts.check: bun run check-types && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.compile: bun run build && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/server && cp ./settings.example.json ./dist/settings.json && mkdir -p ./dist/drizzle && cp -r ./drizzle/* ./dist/drizzle/
scripts.ui:build: mkdir -p ./public/dashboard && bun build ./src/presentation/dashboard/client/index.tsx --outfile ./public/dashboard/client.js --target browser --format esm --minify && cp ./src/presentation/dashboard/styles.css ./public/dashboard/styles.css && cp ./src/presentation/dashboard/login.css ./public/dashboard/login.css && cp ./src/presentation/dashboard/login.js ./public/dashboard/login.js
scripts.test: bun test src/platform/storage/sqlite-store.test.ts src/platform/storage/sqlite-write-queue.test.ts src/platform/storage/storage-path.test.ts && bun test src/platform/auth/auth-dashboard.integration.test.ts src/transport/http/utils/response-headers.test.ts
